docs.title: 🌐 Gemini Enterprise Agent Repository
docs.text:
Welcome to the Gemini Enterprise Agent Repository, built and maintained by Google Cloud Customer Engineers.

Our goal is to help enterprise customers accelerate their AI journey by providing production-ready, secure, and easily deployable Gemini agent templates.

docs.title: 🚀 Available Agents
docs.text:
(Catalog coming soon!)

  • Sales & RFP Assistant: Automate responses to complex RFPs using your enterprise data.
  • Marketing Campaign Generator: Create multi-channel marketing copy grounded in your brand guidelines.

docs.title: 🛠️ How to Deploy
docs.text: Every agent in this repository is designed with One-Click Deploy functionality via Google Cloud Shell.
